fields.title: Implement autoresearch_run and autoresearch_done with one-trial-per-child-session semantics
fields.description:
Replace init_experiment/run_experiment/log_experiment with the new autoresearch execution tools.

Implement:
- autoresearch_run as the only benchmark execution tool for autoresearch child sessions
- autoresearch_done as the only trial finalization tool for autoresearch child sessions
- one pending trial at a time per autoresearch task
- one child session equals one trial
- per-run artifact persistence under .pi/loops/runs/<task-id>/<run-id>/...

Each trial must record logs, parsed metrics, checks results, structured result metadata, and enough context to support debugging and restart-time recovery. The tools must fail fast when called from the controller session, from the wrong child session, or when the task state does not permit the requested transition.
